description: 10-minute poll (Tier P6 — Audit / Action Center / 3 streams). Near-real-time SOC investigation telemetry: Action Center automated remediation actions + Threat Analytics report metadata + per-device action results (Live Response per-step output + AIR linkage). Writes to MDE_ActionCenter_CL, MDE_ThreatAnalytics_CL, MDE_MachineActions_CL. Tier P6 = active investigation context (high frequency for SOC analyst workflows).
